title: HOMELESS SERVICES - 211info
text: COMMUNITY ACTION RESOURCE ENTERPRISES INC HOMELESS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management, transitional housing, rapid re-housing, permanent supportive housing, and veteran's housing services. Offers personal grooming items and shower vouchers when available. 2310 1st Street Suite 2 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness or at risk of Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 842-5261 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 842-5261 Main phone Main phone (503) 842-5261 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Homeless Permanent Supportive Housing Housing Related Coordinated Entry Housing Search Assistance Housing Search Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths Transitional Housing/Shelter Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - ANCHOR SHELTER MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT PROGRAM UTILITIES - EMERGENCY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY ACTION RESOURCE ENTERPRISES INC
